mapper.select: SELECT qsr.role_code FROM qise_sys_role AS qsr LEFT JOIN qise_sys_user_role AS qsur ON qsr.role_id = qsur.role_id LEFT JOIN qise_sys_user AS qsu on qsur.user_id = qsu.id WHERE qsu.is_delete = 0 AND qsu.lock_flag = 0 AND qsu.id = #{sysUserId}

SELECT qsr.* FROM qise_sys_role AS qsr LEFT JOIN qise_sys_user_role AS qsur ON qsr.role_id = qsur.role_id LEFT JOIN qise_sys_user AS qsu on qsur.user_id = qsu.id WHERE qsu.is_delete = 0 AND qsu.lock_flag = 0 AND qsu.id = #{sysUserId}
